name: query-web-shells
bodyMarkdown:
# Web Shell Detection Query

**Category:** Detection Chokepoints | **Maturity:** Hunt | **FP Rate:** Medium
**Techniques:** T1505.003 | **Log Sources:** Sysmon EID 1, EID 11

```kql
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(1h)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in ("w3wp.exe", "httpd.exe", "nginx.exe", "php-fpm.exe")
| where FileName in ("cmd.exe", "powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe", "bash", "sh", "python")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, AccountName
| sort by Timestamp desc
```
